_comment: Corporate bot staging QA scenarios. Tests: Teams webhook, knowledge domains, permissions, SSO, audit. Target: <8min total.

scenarios.name: Register a test knowledge domain
scenarios.text: Use manage_domain to register a domain: id='qa-test-domain', name='QA Test Domain', description='Testing domain for staging QA'

scenarios.name: Index document into test domain
scenarios.text:
Use index_document to add this to qa-test-domain with path 'test.md': '# Test Document

This is a test document about Kubernetes deployment.

## Steps

1. Build Docker image
2. Push to ECR
3. Apply Helm chart
4. Verify pods are running

## Troubleshooting

If pods crash, check logs with kubectl logs.'

scenarios.name: Search knowledge finds indexed content
scenarios.text: Use search_knowledge to find information about 'Kubernetes deployment steps'

scenarios.name: List domains shows registered domain
scenarios.text: Use manage_domain action=list to show all domains

scenarios.name: Basic chat works for employees
scenarios.text: What can you help me with?

scenarios.name: Domain health check
scenarios.text: Use manage_domain action=health to check domain system health

scenarios.name: Employee can search knowledge domains
scenarios.text: Use search_knowledge to search for 'Kubernetes deployment' across all domains you have access to

scenarios.name: Employee cannot register new domain
scenarios.text: Use manage_domain action=register to register a domain: id='hacked-domain', name='Unauthorized Domain', description='This should fail'

scenarios.name: Multi-domain chat gets combined modules
scenarios.text: List my currently active knowledge domains and tell me what skills and prompt modules are available to me in this session

scenarios.name: FACTS_UPDATE with domain field routes correctly
scenarios.text: Remember this infrastructure fact for the qa-test-domain: The staging cluster uses Helm 3.14 with ArgoCD for GitOps deployment. Store it as a fact with domain=qa-test-domain.
